violations.text: The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in the establishment. Pest control service unknown. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Ice scoop observed inside the ice machine with the handle in the ice. Utensils must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food, or in a clean container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Self-service milk and cream were observed held at 47 and 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC removed from service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The self-service beverage reach-in was not in good repair, not in operation during inspection, awaiting maintenance. Foods requiring refrigeration are not to be in this unit until serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
Dishwasher located in the warewashing area was not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the warewashing area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by mop bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Milk was observed held at 50-56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed and took unit out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean (the ledge by water dispenser). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The self service beverage self service reach in refrigerator was not in good repair, not maintaining temperature of 41 degrees or below. Foods requiring refrigeration are not to be stored there until the unit is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
Dishwasher located in the ware washing area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
